subcodes.first_line: O thou who turnest thy face toward God! Despair not of the Spirit of God, for thy Lord is the solace of thy heart and thy companion in solitude [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها المقبله الی الله لاتیاس من روح الله ان ربک سلوه لقلبک و مونسک فی وحشتک
subcodes.subjects: @nearness and remoteness, @consolation and comfort, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
